title: acalypha mappa
intro: Acalypha mappa, also known as the Indian nettle, is a plant species native to tropical Africa and Asia. The medicinal properties of Acalypha mappa include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and ringworm, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections. Acalypha mappa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or ointments, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
